task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Options' dialog box is open and visible on the screen, typically accessed via the Tools menu.

task_completion.description: Set the global time zone to Eastern Time
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Options window (usually under General), the 'Time Zone' dropdown is set to '(UTC-05:00) Eastern Time (US & Canada)'.
In the Options window, the checkbox for 'Show Tabs' is checked.
In the Options window, the checkbox for 'Global simulation order fill processing' is checked.

task_completion.description: Change the platform skin to 'Slate Gray'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Options window (usually under General -> Skin), the 'Skin' dropdown is set to 'Slate Gray'.

task_completion.description: Save the workspace to persist changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Workspaces' menu is open with 'Save' being clicked, or a save workspace confirmation/dialog is visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Settings were changed using the NinjaTrader 8 Options dialog box, not by editing XML configuration files in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown in the screenshots has the standard NinjaTrader 8 interface, logo, and window styling.

integrity.description: Agent did not use external scripts to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows or script editors (like PowerShell or Python) open and executing commands to modify the NinjaTrader workspace or config directories.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NinjaTrader 8 settings are accessed via the Options window (Tools -> Options). The 'Slate Gray' skin is a verified default option in the platform. The correct timezone label in the GUI is '(UTC-05:00) Eastern Time (US & Canada)', which corresponds to the Windows 'Eastern Standard Time' identifier. Workspaces are saved via the main window's Workspaces menu and are stored in C:\Users\<user>\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.
